subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Divine Bounty doth, in all ages, summon creation unto the Dawning-Place of the Light of Oneness, inasmuch as He hath fashioned His creatures [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لسان عنایت حق در کل احیان خلق را بمطلع نور احدیت دعوت میفرماید چه که خلق خود را
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @knowledge; recognition of God
